case_title: THE URBAN SCHOOL OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. JISA, HANNAH et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE URBAN SCHOOL OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT JISA, HANNAH DOE 1 THROUGH 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-14-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-17-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-24-1997
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE URBAN SCHOOL OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED FEB-10-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JISA, HANNAH
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-10-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-10-1997, TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LUCIUS A COOPER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-25-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-10-1997 TO FEB-25-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-13-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC ON PLTF'S ATTY LUCIUS A. COOPER. HEARING SET FOR JUL-23-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE URBAN SCHOOL OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT JISA, HANNAH

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-10-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-10-1997, TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LUCIUS A COOPER. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO FILE A STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-25-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-10-1997 TO OCT-22-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-22-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT COUNSEL TO FILE STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-1997 CONTINUED FROM OCT-22-1997 TO DEC-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-14-1997, CONTINUED TO JUN-13-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-23-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY LUCIUS A COOPER. HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
